phrases.intent_en: Ask what the Kalsa neighbourhood is known for
phrases.text_local: Scusi, per cosa è famoso il quartiere Kalsa?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, per KOH-zah eh fah-MOH-zoh eel kwahr-TYEH-reh KAL-sah?
phrases.cultural_note: The Kalsa is Palermo's oldest Arab-Norman quarter, historically the city's noble district, now known for contemporary art and restored palaces.

responses.english: For the Arab-Norman palaces and contemporary art museums.
responses.phonetic: per ee pah-LAHT-tsee ah-RAH-boh-nor-MAN-nee eh ee moo-ZEH-ee DAR-teh kon-tem-poh-RAH-neh-ah.
responses.local: Per i palazzi arabo-normanni e i musei d'arte contemporanea.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Palazzo Abatellis museum is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la Galleria Regionale della Sicilia?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah gal-leh-REE-ah reh-joh-NAH-leh DEL-lah see-CHEEL-yah?

responses.english: On Via Alloro, in Palazzo Abatellis, it's nearby.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah al-LOH-roh, nel pah-LAHT-tsoh ah-bah-TEL-lees, eh kwee vee-CHEE-noh.
responses.local: In Via Alloro, nel Palazzo Abatellis, è qui vicino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Kalsa from the city centre
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si raggiunge la Kalsa dal centro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see raj-JOO-njeh lah KAL-sah dal CHEN-troh?

responses.english: On foot along Corso Vittorio Emanuele, fifteen minutes.
responses.phonetic: ah PYEH-dee LOON-goh eel KOR-soh veet-TOH-ryoh eh-man-WEH-leh, kween-DEE-chee mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: A piedi lungo il Corso Vittorio Emanuele, quindici minuti.

responses.english: Head toward the sea — it's the square with the large ficus.
responses.phonetic: SHEN-dah VER-soh eel MAH-reh, eh lah PYAHT-tsah kon eel GRAN-deh FEE-koos.
responses.local: Scenda verso il mare, è la piazza con il grande ficus.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the area has good street food
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è street food tipico nella Kalsa?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh street food TEE-pee-koh NEL-lah KAL-sah?

responses.english: Yes, spleen sandwiches and sfincione, especially at the market.
responses.phonetic: see, PAH-neh kah meh-OO-zah eh sfeen-CHOH-neh, speh-CHAHL-men-teh al mer-KAH-toh.
responses.local: Sì, pane ca' meusa e sfincione, specialmente al mercato.
